title: Neom Mathventure
description: A math game built for my children featuring tapir and capybara mascots. The difficulty increases as the child progresses.

title: Vimanam
description: Generate Markdown documentation from OpenAPI specifications. Supports both OpenAPI v2 and v3 json files.

title: Markdown Table Converter
description: Convert fragile Markdown tables into a robust, readable YAML format for Hugo shortcodes.

title: API Query Builder
description: A dynamic tool that generates complex CLI commands on-the-fly from an OpenAPI specification.
